Target: localhost:4317OTLP

Multi-Layered Request TracerAuthorized

Tracking execution path across 6 middleware layers (Last-In-First-Out)

Total Latency
61ms

1. Prompt Injection Shield

Inspects raw JSON-RPC payloads for jailbreaks & malicious prompts

14ms
[INFO] Payload scan clean. No heuristics matched.

2. Row-Level Security (RLS) Context

Applies tenancy and data-isolation scopes

4ms
[INFO] RLS Policy 'tenant_a_strict' attached to context.

3. Scope Enforcement

Verifies OAuth scopes/permissions for requested tool

2ms
[INFO] Tool 'salesforce.query' authorized for scopes [nexusmcp:read].

4. JWT Validation

Decrypts RS256 signatures, verifies issuer and expiration

18ms
[INFO] JWT Signature valid. Issuer matched. Token active.

5. Request ID & Correlation

Attaches unique request_id and tracing headers

1ms
[INFO] Attached Trace ID: 8a4b... Request ID: req_92f3a8b2

6. TLS Termination

Final boundary checks and decryption

22ms
[INFO] Connection secured via mTLS.
